title: French Seafood Cassoulet
description: A hearty French dish featuring seafood and white beans, perfect for a cold winter's night. This cassoulet is a creative twist on the classic recipe, with succulent seafood and a rich flavor profile.
instructions: Cook the French White Beans according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the Garlic and cook until fragrant.
Add the Seafood Mix and cook until heated through.
In a separate saucepan, combine the Cassoulet and cooked White Beans.
Add the cooked Seafood Mix and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with the chopped Parsley.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
